arts.ttl: Barnet And York city All Set For First vs Second Showdown
arts.sum: The National League leaders host the second place Minstermen looking to put the record straight after goals from Marvin Armstrong, Alex Hunt and Ollie Pearce knocked them top off top spot in October. He spoke to DAZN ahead of the game and said: "Adam Hinshelwood has done a great job, hasn't he?
